text.title: diary-study-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for diary-study-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Voice entries with PII (addresses, names, financial info) transcribed to cloud LLM without local processing first.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Transcribe locally (Whisper) before any cloud LLM step. dscout and similar SaaS hold raw audio — verify data residency before uploading.

failure-mode.description: LLM theme synthesis over-clusters early entries; agent flattens evolution across the study.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force per-week themes and require the model to surface "themes that emerged this week vs prior weeks" so evolution isn't flattened.

failure-mode.description: Vision models miss the actual subject when captioning image entries.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pair vision caption with the participant's text caption — never rely on the vision model alone.

failure-mode.description: Reminder fatigue: automated nudges feel spammy after the third unanswered prompt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Switch to a single human-style check-in DM after two missed days, or adjust entry expectations with the participant.

failure-mode.description: Compliance metrics ("X entries received") hide entry quality.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run a quality classifier and report "usable entries" separately. Flag entries that are vague, off-topic, or repetitive.

failure-mode.description: Agent autonomously decides to extend the study or ask additional questions mid-study.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Protocol changes mid-study invalidate cross-participant comparison and need researcher approval. Agents should flag themes but not modify protocol.
